name: Fossil Warrior Skull Bone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>新</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> スカルポーン
desc:
1 Rock monster + 1 Level 4 or lower monster
Must first be Special Summoned with "Fossil Fusion". This card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Time Stream" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Fossil Warrior Skull Bone" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
